top_gap_prompt: Which AI tooling software should a AI Engineer or ML Ops Lead at a product company use?
category_long: AI evaluation and model testing platform for engineering teams

gaps.title: Missing FAQPage schema on pricing and comparison pages
gaps.description: Braintrust's pricing page does not include FAQPage markup, causing it to miss high-intent 'how much does X cost' and 'X vs Y pricing' slots in Google AI Overviews.

gaps.title: Thin or missing dedicated competitor-comparison pages
gaps.description: Braintrust lacks depth on '[brand] vs [competitor]' comparison pages, making it less likely to appear when AI models answer alternative/comparison queries.

gaps.title: No HowTo schema on documentation and tutorial pages
gaps.description: Braintrust's help center and tutorials lack HowTo structured data, reducing appearance in step-by-step instructional responses from Google AI Overviews and Perplexity.

gap_prompts.prompt_text: Which AI tooling software should a AI Engineer or ML Ops Lead at a product company use?
gap_prompts.why_it_matters: Discovery queries drive early-funnel awareness. Buyers use these to find solutions to problems they haven't yet named. Missing here means you're invisible before the consideration stage.

gap_prompts.prompt_text: Best AI tooling alternatives for AI engineering teams building and deploying LLM-powered products teams on a budget
gap_prompts.why_it_matters: Alternative searches are used by buyers actively switching tools. Visibility here captures switching-intent demand at its peak.

gap_prompts.prompt_text: Vellum vs alternatives: what should I switch to?
gap_prompts.why_it_matters: Alternative searches are used by buyers actively switching tools. Visibility here captures switching-intent demand at its peak.
